subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice unto Thee! The fragrances of Thy Pen have caused all pillars and elements to quiver with joy, and willingly have we drunk from the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لک الفداء نفحات قلمیه آن حضرت جمیع ارکان و اعراق را مهتز نمود طوعا لکاس شربنا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @petitions to authorities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @growth of the Cause
